creator: davidx@viasoft.com.cn
text:
see some logs in /var/log.nmbd

[2001/04/19 10:50:01, 0] nmbd/nmbd_subnetdb.c:create_subnets(242)
  create_subnets: No local interfaces !
[2001/04/19 10:50:01, 0] nmbd/nmbd.c:main(831)
  ERROR: Failed when creating subnet lists. Exiting.

I think it's nmbd's fault. why not delay and loop until it find an interface
can be
binded ?
current nmbd does not work well with PCMCIA. I will put some tweaks
in /etc/pccard.conf to start nmbd when PCMCIA is ready. but it's ugly.

Thanks,
David Xu

----- Original Message -----
From: David W. Chapman Jr. <dwcjr@inethouston.net>
To: David Xu <davidx@viasoft.com.cn>; <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org>;
<davidx@mail.viasoft.com.cn>
Sent: Thursday, April 19, 2001 10:41 AM
Subject: Re: ports/25027: samba nmbd core dumped on isolated machine


> samba 2.2.0-release is in the ports.  Upgrade and see if it fixes
anything.
>
